case_title: CRESCENT MANOR, A LTD PARTNERSHIP vs. HARRIS, FRED et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRESCENT MANOR, A LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, FRED
